summary.lv: Grafton Latvia meklē Technical Consultant strauji augošam SaaS uzņēmumam, kurš izstrādā risinājumus sarežģītu procesu optimizācijai un datu vadītu ieskatu radīšanai. Darbs klātienē, atalgojums €2500–3000 mēnesī.
summary.en: Grafton Latvia is recruiting a Technical Consultant for a fast-growing SaaS company delivering solutions to streamline complex processes and generate data-driven insights, in an on-site role offering €2,500–3,000/month.
